summary: Israel has completed sealing a 16+ km underground tunnel in southern Rafah that was used by Hamas and held the body of Hadar Goldin, using over 30,000 cubic meters of concrete. Defense Minister Katz disclosed that US President Trump pressured PM Netanyahu to link the Lebanese and Iranian arenas, which constrained Israel's campaign against Hezbollah and prevented what Katz claimed would have been Hezbollah's collapse. Iran has requested a meeting with the US that will take place tomorrow in Doha, while Katz ordered the IDF to prepare for 'Blue and White' operations inside Iran.
key_points: IDF engineering forces from Gaza Division and Southern Command completed sealing a 16+ km underground tunnel in southern Rafah using over 30,000 cubic meters of concrete, destroying approximately 80 living quarters and a command center located under public buildings including schools and clinics. (Source: @yediotnews25/132069)

Defense Minister Katz stated that President Trump pressured PM Netanyahu to link the Lebanese and Iranian arenas, which constrained Israel's campaign and prevented Hezbollah's collapse; Israel shifted to 'Plan B' involving operations north of the Litani River and expanding the security zone in southern Lebanon. (Source: @manniefabian/58707)
Iran has requested a meeting with the US that will take place tomorrow in Doha, according to President Trump's Truth Social post. (Source: @Faytuks_Network/4504)

Katz ordered the IDF to prepare for 'Blue and White' operations inside Iran, stating Israel has targets ready and the military is on alert, though Israel will not interfere with the US president's diplomatic course. (Source: @rodast_omiddana/74523)

IDF killed Ismail Masri, chief of Hamas's military security in the Rafah Brigade, who was responsible for advancing activities to harm IDF freedom of action and coordinated security and counterintelligence in the Rafah Brigade during the war. (Source: @manniefabian/58706)

Katz stated that in western and central sectors of southern Lebanon there is almost 100% destruction in villages along the line of contact, while in the eastern sector 73% of villages are destroyed; approximately 600,000 Shiites fled southern Lebanon villages and 700,000 were displaced from Beirut's Dahiyeh. (Source: @manniefabian/58707)
Israeli warplanes struck the town of Deir Siryan in southern Lebanon. (Source: @presstv/196176)

Gunmen opened fire on a family car in Saravan, southeastern Iran, killing the driver and wounding his wife and three-year-old child; the attack was reportedly carried out by a US-Israeli-linked terrorist group. (Source: @presstv/196169)

sections.executive_summary: Israel completed sealing a 16+ km Hamas tunnel in southern Rafah using over 30,000 cubic meters of concrete, destroying approximately 80 living quarters and a command center beneath public buildings. Defense Minister Katz revealed that US President Trump pressured PM Netanyahu to link the Lebanese and Iranian arenas, which constrained Israel's campaign against Hezbollah and shifted operations to 'Plan B' involving expansion of the security zone north of the Litani River. Iran has requested a US meeting scheduled for tomorrow in Doha, while Katz ordered the IDF to prepare 'Blue and White' operations inside Iran with targets already identified.

points: Iran has requested a meeting with the United States that will take place tomorrow in Doha, Qatar, according to President Trump's Truth Social post. This represents a potential diplomatic opening amid heightened tensions. (Source: @Faytuks_Network/4504)

Gunmen opened fire on a family car in Saravan, southeastern Iran, killing the driver and wounding his wife and three-year-old child; the attack was reportedly carried out by a US-Israeli-linked terrorist group. (Source: @presstv/196169)
Several IRGC checkpoints and patrols were spotted near Mehrabad Airport, west of Tehran, Tehran Province, indicating heightened security posture in the capital. (Source: @shin_persian/7294)

Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian stated that six billion dollars of Iran's twelve billion dollars in resources in Qatar have been freed and returned to the country, with efforts ongoing to recover the remaining amount. (Source: @VahidOnline/76740)

Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman Esmaeil Baghaei stated that the US delegation's visit to Qatar is unrelated to the Iranian delegation's visit and that there is no meeting scheduled between them. (Source: @lelotsenzura/93309)

Katz warned that war with Iran could happen at any moment, stating that if Iran attacks Israel it would be the third and possibly final Israeli-Iranian war, and that Iran has not yet decided whether to return to its nuclear program. (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/373590)
Rubio and Witkoff are scheduled to brief Congress on Iran today, according to Punchbowl reports. (Source: @shin_persian/7298)

Defense Minister Katz ordered the IDF to prepare for 'Blue and White' operations inside Iran, stating Israel has multiple targets ready and the military is on alert, though Israel will not interfere with the US president's diplomatic approach toward Iran. (Source: @rodast_omiddana/74523)

Katz disclosed that President Trump pressured PM Netanyahu during their fifth call to link the Lebanese and Iranian arenas, which constrained Israel's campaign; Katz was not present on that call and expressed regret over the linkage, calling it an American interest. (Source: @manniefabian/58707)

Katz stated Israel has no territorial ambitions in Lebanon but will not withdraw a millimeter until Hezbollah is disarmed, and that the IDF's presence in Lebanon will be long-term; he does not believe the Lebanese army will confront Hezbollah. (Source: @manniefabian/58707)
Katz confirmed that Israel and US Central Command chief Adm. Brad Cooper agreed that the IDF will not withdraw from the three security zones in Lebanon, Syria, and Gaza. (Source: @manniefabian/58707)

Katz stated that had there been no linkage between Lebanon and Iran arenas, Hezbollah would have collapsed; the IDF had planned a massive aerial campaign that would have dismantled Hezbollah, and the group was begging Iran to save it. (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/373590)

Katz stated the IDF still has more tunnels to destroy, including a major underground Hezbollah system beneath the Beaufort Ridge, which will be destroyed with 500 tons of explosives. (Source: @manniefabian/58707)
A bus caught fire on Highway 1 toward Jerusalem. (Source: @yediotnews25/132055)

IDF engineering forces from Gaza Division and Southern Command completed sealing a 16+ km underground tunnel in southern Rafah that was used by Hamas and held the body of Hadar Goldin, using over 30,000 cubic meters of concrete over three months; the destroyed infrastructure included approximately 80 living quarters and a command center located under public buildings including schools and clinics. (Source: @yediotnews25/132069)

IDF and Shin Bet killed Ismail Masri, chief of Hamas's military security in the Rafah Brigade, who was responsible for advancing activities intended to harm IDF freedom of action in the Gaza Strip and coordinated security and counterintelligence fields in the Rafah Brigade during the war. (Source: @manniefabian/58706)

Battalion 53 has entered the Gaza Strip after two months of operational activity in the north and two months in southern Lebanon, replacing the mountainous terrain with the southern coastal line of Rafah, where they are engaged in destroying terror infrastructure and tunnels. (Source: @New_security8200/202150)
Smotrich stated that preparations are complete for establishing three settlements in northern Gaza, pending Netanyahu's approval. (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/373623)
Israeli warplanes struck the town of Deir Siryan in southern Lebanon. (Source: @presstv/196176)

Katz stated that in western and central sectors of southern Lebanon there is almost 100% destruction in villages along the line of contact, while in the eastern sector 73% of villages are destroyed; approximately 600,000 Shiites fled southern Lebanon villages and 700,000 were displaced from Beirut's Dahiyeh stronghold. (Source: @manniefabian/58707)

Katz confirmed Israel recently tried to get the Lebanese army to enter the Ali Taher Ridge area, under which Hezbollah has a major tunnel system, to clear it of terror operatives, but the Lebanese army refused; the IDF remains stationed in the area but has not entered the underground passages where approximately 30 Hezbollah operatives are believed to be holed up. (Source: @manniefabian/58707)

Katz stated the IDF still has more tunnels to destroy, including a major underground Hezbollah system beneath the Beaufort Ridge, which will be destroyed with 500 tons of explosives. (Source: @manniefabian/58707)

Katz stated Israel shifted to 'Plan B' involving IDF operations north of the Litani River and expansion of its security zone in southern Lebanon over the past month, carried out with US approval. (Source: @manniefabian/58707)

Katz stated the linkage between Lebanon and Iran arenas was an American interest and a constraint of the partnership with the United States; when Trump linked the arenas, Israel stopped bringing down buildings in Beirut but continued targeted attacks including the assassination of the Radwan Force commander. (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/373590)

Katz confirmed that when he met US Central Command chief Adm. Brad Cooper, they agreed that the IDF will not withdraw from the three security zones — in Lebanon, Syria, and Gaza. (Source: @manniefabian/58707)
Iran has requested a meeting with the United States that will take place tomorrow in Doha, Qatar. (Source: @Faytuks_Network/4504)

Iranian President Pezeshkian stated that six billion dollars of Iran's twelve billion dollars in resources in Qatar have been freed and returned to the country, with efforts ongoing to recover the remaining amount. (Source: @VahidOnline/76740)

Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman Baghaei stated that the US delegation's visit to Qatar is unrelated to the Iranian delegation's visit and that there is no meeting between them. (Source: @lelotsenzura/93309)
The Qatari Ministry of Transportation has advised all maritime vessels to temporarily suspend sailing and other maritime activities. (Source: @Faytuks_Network/4518)
The White House spokeswoman told Fox News that violence from Iran will be met with violence and the US will continue to respond to Iranian attacks on commercial ships. (Source: @lelotsenzura/93303)

key_developments: IDF completed sealing a 16+ km Hamas tunnel in southern Rafah using over 30,000 cubic meters of concrete, destroying approximately 80 living quarters and a command center beneath public buildings including schools and clinics; the tunnel held the body of Hadar Goldin. (Source: @yediotnews25/132069)

Iran requested a US meeting scheduled for tomorrow in Doha, Qatar, per President Trump's Truth Social post, while Iranian officials stated the US delegation's Qatar visit is unrelated to Iran's and no meeting between them is planned. (Source: @Faytuks_Network/4504)

Defense Minister Katz ordered IDF to prepare 'Blue and White' operations inside Iran with targets ready and military on alert, warning war could happen at any moment and would be the third and possibly final Israeli-Iranian war. (Source: @rodast_omiddana/74523)

Katz disclosed Trump pressured Netanyahu to link Lebanese and Iranian arenas, constraining Israel's Hezbollah campaign and preventing what Katz claimed would have been Hezbollah's collapse; Israel shifted to 'Plan B' with operations north of the Litani River. (Source: @manniefabian/58707)

IDF killed Ismail Masri, chief of Hamas military security in the Rafah Brigade, responsible for advancing activities to harm IDF freedom of action and coordinating security and counterintelligence in the Rafah Brigade during the war. (Source: @manniefabian/58706)

Katz stated almost 100% destruction in villages along the line of contact in western and central southern Lebanon, 73% in the eastern sector; 600,000 Shiites fled southern villages and 700,000 displaced from Beirut's Dahiyeh. (Source: @manniefabian/58707)

Israeli warplanes struck Deir Siryan in southern Lebanon; gunmen attacked a family car in Saravan, southeastern Iran, killing the driver and wounding his wife and child, reportedly carried out by a US-Israeli-linked group. (Source: @presstv/196176)
sections.threat_assessment: The threat environment is highly volatile with multiple simultaneous flashpoints. Israel has ordered the IDF to prepare 'Blue and White' operations inside Iran with identified targets ready, while Katz warned war could erupt within days if Iran attacks Israel with ballistic missiles in response to Lebanon operations. The US-Iran meeting scheduled for tomorrow in Doha represents a potential diplomatic off-ramp, though Iranian officials have denied coordination with the US delegation's Qatar visit. Hezbollah remains degraded but not collapsed, with approximately 30 operatives still holed up in tunnels beneath Ali Taher Ridge and a major system beneath Beaufort Ridge slated for destruction with 500 tons of explosives. The linkage between Lebanese and Iranian arenas imposed by the US constrains Israeli operations but also creates a framework where escalation in one theater could trigger the other.
sections.regional_response: The United States is actively mediating between the Lebanese and Iranian arenas, with President Trump pressuring Netanyahu to link the two theaters and the White House warning that Iranian violence against commercial ships will be met with continued response. Qatar is serving as the venue for the upcoming US-Iran meeting while also seeing the unfreezing of six billion dollars of Iranian assets, though the Qatari Ministry of Transportation has advised all maritime vessels to temporarily suspend sailing. The Lebanese army has refused Israeli requests to enter the Ali Taher Ridge area to clear Hezbollah operatives from tunnels, indicating continued Lebanese institutional reluctance to confront Hezbollah directly. Iran has heightened security around Mehrabad Airport in Tehran with increased IRGC checkpoints and patrols.
sections.intelligence_notes: The IDF's completion of the 16+ km tunnel seal in Rafah using 30,000+ cubic meters of concrete over three months represents a significant engineering and intelligence achievement, revealing the scale of Hamas's subterranean infrastructure beneath civilian structures. Katz's disclosure of the five calls between Trump and Netanyahu provides rare insight into US-Israel decision-making dynamics, revealing that the fifth call — from which Katz was excluded — was the critical moment when Trump imposed the Lebanon-Iran linkage. The discrepancy between Trump's announcement of a US-Iran meeting in Doha and the Iranian Foreign Ministry's denial of any connection between the delegations' Qatar visits suggests either ongoing negotiation over meeting terms or deliberate Iranian signaling. The destruction percentages cited by Katz (100% in western/central sectors, 73% in eastern sector) and displacement figures (600,000 from southern villages, 700,000 from Dahiyeh) provide measurable indicators of the campaign's impact on Lebanon's Shiite population centers.
